creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
On Tue, Apr 12, 2011 at 3:52 PM, Aldis Berjoza <aldis@bsdroot.lv> wrote:

> Thanks.
> Btw, I couldn't apply it cleanly. It failed on Makefile (other files were
> patched OK)

Hmm, and the error is?

Have you reverted your changes? If not rm -rf /usr/ports/games/klavaro
and run csup/cvsup again.
Afterwards:

# cd /usr/ports
# patch -p0 < klavaro_1_9_0_diff.txt

I have tested this several times.

-Herbert
